since_last: 38% of 87 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +3.05%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 38% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.00% · BTC -2.40% · Gold +1.20% · Nasdaq100 +0.75%. 38% of 87 AI names are green — broad selling. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +3.05%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +3.05%; weakest is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -3.36%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: MU is the standout at +16.33%
cards.body: Leaders: MU +16.33%, AMAT +14.05%, TER +10.98%, KLAC +8.41%, LRCX +8.06%. Laggards: INOD -10.51%, AAPL -6.25%, AI -6.12%, OKLO -5.62%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.90% at $153.15
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.90% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
